headline: Can Digital Realty (DLR) Capitalize on the AI-driven Data Center Demand?
summary: Digital Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE:DLR) is one of the 10 Best Under-the-Radar Data Center Stocks to Buy. The stock is up 34.90% from its price a year ago and 29.56% year-to-date. On April 22, Stifel raised its price target on Digital Realty to $230 from $200 while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock, according […]

headline: Digital Realty Trust Sees 6GW Of Capacity Expansion In The Future
summary: Digital Realty Trust sees AI data center growth with a 1.2GW buildout and a $1.8B backlog, but premium valuation limits upside. Click for this DLR stock update.

headline: Citizens Maintains Market Outperform on Digital Realty Trust, Raises Price Target to $250
summary: Citizens  analyst Greg Miller   maintains Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Market Outperform and raises the price target from $220 to $250.

headline: HSBC Downgrades Digital Realty Trust to Hold, Raises Price Target to $210
